news.title: Standstill in Indian Gold Imports Drags On and Threatens Supply
news.description: Indian banks have been unable to import gold and silver for five weeks, an unusually long halt that’s pushing up domestic prices and threatening shortages in the world’s second-biggest bullion market.

news.title: The inflation-growth double whammy: how investors should rebalance now
news.description: With inflation rising and growth forecasts trimmed, investors face a “double whammy.” Here’s how to recalibrate portfolios across debt, equities, real assets and global exposure.

news.title: Sensex, Nifty rise on ceasefire hopes; L&T drags as IndiGo, M&M lead gains
news.description: Sensex and Nifty rise on ceasefire optimism, led by IndiGo and M&M, despite L&T dragging down gains.

news.title: 科氪 | 性能操控赛主机、续航全能超旗舰，「颗秒神器」一加 Ace 6 至尊版正式发布！
